nextArtifacts: formal spec artifact set from next session prompt
keyDecisions: @beep/semantic-web should be the canonical semantic-web foundation package
JSON-LD is first-class in the initial surface
foundation plus adapters is the primary package posture
IRI and ProvO are seed assets, not the full package design
ontology builder DSL work stays experimental unless later research justifies promotion
Schema.toEquivalence is the default equality surface for schema-modeled domain values
Graph is projection-only and should not be the primary RDF semantic model
important public semantic-web schemas should carry typed semantic metadata annotations using a validated custom schema annotation pattern
PROV-O should be treated as the interoperable provenance backbone, paired with explicit evidence anchoring, lifecycle fields, and bounded projection strategies
IRI and URI remain separate first-class public concepts in v1 with IRI as the semantic default
Web Annotation is an adapter seam rather than a hard package-wide dependency in v1
SemanticSchemaMetadata.kind should be a closed intentionally coarse literal domain in v1
